overview: A luxurious, premium 3D animated showcase website for Makeupbyshiviagg — a bridal and celebrity makeup artist based in Noida. Features hero section with animated 3D objects, animated services gallery, Indian client testimonials, FAQ section, celebrity work badges, contact CTA sections, floating Instagram and WhatsApp buttons, embedded maps, and a 'Why Choose Us' section. All sections use a pinkish-dark color theme with blurry glow effects, premium 3D animations, and smooth transitions.
features: Full 3D animated hero with particles, floating objects and premium photo
Services showcase with 3D hover card effects
Celebrity & compliments section with animated badges
Why Choose Us section with animated cards
Floating Instagram and WhatsApp action buttons
Pinkish-dark luxury theme with blurry glow effects
